files.purpose: Defines Vite and Phaser dependencies plus scripts to run and build the Milestone 1 vertical slice.
Configures Vite with the required relative base path for Azure Static Web Apps deployment.
Hosts the Phaser canvas and loads the Vite entry module.
Provides SPA navigation fallback to index.html for Azure Static Web Apps.
Creates the Phaser game instance, registers all scenes, and boots the FSM loop.
Centralizes Arrow keys plus Z/X input mapping into verb-based accessors shared by all scenes and controllers.
Tracks score, lives, difficulty level, sport rotation, and result payloads across scene transitions.
Preloads placeholder and sport assets, initializes shared managers, and transitions to the menu.
Shows the title and controls, starts the normal sport loop, and exposes debug key M for the mash-up round.
Runs a selected sport or mash-up by wiring one controller to one level manager and rendering the shared HUD.
Displays a brief success or fail overlay, updates progression through GameManager, and auto-rolls the next round.
Implements side-to-side movement and a short-lived paddle strike hitbox using shared input verbs.
Builds the pickleball court, kitchen zone, ball rules, deterministic serve, volley counting, and win/fail conditions.
Implements side-to-side movement, facing-aware dash strike behavior, and charge timing for soccer kicks.
Builds the soccer field, goal trigger, moving goalie hazard, heavy ball interactions, and soccer win/fail rules.
Defines the debug mash-up configuration that pairs the pickleball controller with the soccer level manager.
